description: Ben Rubin discusses his journey in creating digital spaces, including platforms like Meerkat and Houseparty, and the impact of remote work on community engagement. He reflects on the peak usage of Houseparty during the pandemic and the challenges of monetizing a predominantly young user base.
topic_summary: Ben Rubin shares insights on crypto communities, the evolution of digital interaction, and the dynamics of remote work, highlighting the significance of community engagement in online platforms [t=138:70].
